captions: select the icon next to import settings item
open the icon to the right of the import settings
select next at the bottom right corner

free email client for Android that allows you to synchronize all your email accounts, check your email, write, reply, receive push notifications for new emails and many other features. 

Its improved features include: 

	â€¢  Push mail using IMAP IDLE
	â€¢  Better performance
	â€¢  Message refiling
	â€¢  Email signatures
	â€¢  Bcc-to-self
	â€¢  Folder subscriptions
	â€¢  All folder synchronization
	â€¢  Return-address configuration
	â€¢  Keyboard shortcuts
	â€¢  Better IMAP support
	â€¢  Saving attachments to SD
	â€¢  Empty Trash
	â€¢  Message sorting
	â€¢  …and more


This application supports all email services: 

- Yahoo - Gmail - Outlook ( Hotmail ) - Yandex - AOL - Lycos Mail - Hispavista - Zoho Mail - Terra - GMX - Latin Mail - Hush Mail - Inbox - Short Mail - Mail.com - My Way Mail - La Poste (Francia) - Maildrop - Emailtemporalgratis - Yopmail - Air Mail - Others... 

Please submit bug reports, contribute new features and ask questions at https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.dustinapps.yahuu.
